rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF T.LES.S.C.'s Motion For Reconsideration Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. The motion fails to comply with requirements of CCP § 1008 and Plaintiff does not comply with SFLR 2.7B.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENIA SALGUERO ET AL VS. RICARDO ALVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVA AND GLADYS ALVA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Defendants' brief is beyond the maximum permitted page limit under CRC 3.1113(d) and the parties do not comply with SFLR 2.7B.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL S. HOSHIYAMA VS. CARMELO SOLANO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT CARMELO SOLANO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to allege that he has an interest in the premises, fails to explain why personal service was not accomplished, and fails to attach the two pages referred to in the first amended complaint.= (501/REQ)
